items.hook: HDB has ramped up two-room flat supply for singles
items.caption:
HDB has ramped up two-room flat supply for singles. But more units have not made the ballot easier, because demand has risen just as fast. If you are a single buyer in the queue, plan for a long wait and keep resale options on your radar as a backup. Track BTO and resale data side by side at propsight.sg, link in bio.

Send this to a friend who is house hunting.
items.cap_zh:
HDB 增加了两房式BTO单位的供应，但申请的单身买家同样越来越多，抽签竞争依然激烈。如果你是单身申请者，等待时间预计不会缩短，也要留意转售市场的选择。前往 propsight.sg 查看最新数据，链接在简介栏。

把这个发给正在看房的朋友。

items.hook: Dunearn House just launched as the first private condo in Bukit Timah Turf City, startin
items.caption:
Dunearn House just launched as the first private condo in Bukit Timah Turf City, starting from $2,799 psf. That puts it in a league of its own location-wise, but also in a price bracket above most suburban projects. Before you commit to pioneer pricing, check what comparable units have actually sold for nearby. All the transaction data you need is free at propsight.sg, link in bio.

Send this to someone deciding where to buy.
items.cap_zh:
Dunearn House 刚刚发售，是武吉知马赛马场城（Turf City）首个私人condo，起步价每平方英尺2,799新元。地段独特，但价格也远高于一般市郊condo。入市前，建议先查清楚周边近期的实际成交价，再判断这个溢价是否值得。所有成交数据免费查询，前往 propsight.sg，链接在简介栏。

转发给还没决定买哪里的人。

items.hook: Only 93 multi-generation HDB flats exist in Bishan, and one just hit the market at $1.59
items.caption:
Only 93 multi-generation HDB flats exist in Bishan, and one just hit the market at $1.59M. These units are built for two generations who want real separation without buying two separate homes. The scarcity is genuine and the asking price reflects it. Check what these flats have actually transacted for at propsight.sg, link in bio.

Know someone flat hunting? Send it their way.
items.cap_zh:
碧山只有93个多代同堂HDB单位，其中一个刚以159万新元挂牌出售。这类单位专为两代家庭设计，各有独立生活空间，不需要买两套房。数量稀少，要价自然不低，这是市场的现实。想查看这类HDB的实际成交记录，请到propsight.sg，link in bio。

认识正在找房的人？转给他。

items.hook: Private resale prices are holding near $1,753 psf, up 3.8% over the year but barely movi
items.caption:
Private resale prices are holding near $1,753 psf, up 3.8% over the year but barely moving month to month. There is no distress in this market, just a pause at a high level. The real story is in the suburbs: mass-market condos and HDB towns outside the core are still climbing while prime is the one segment that has slipped. Read the full breakdown in this month's free market report at propsight.sg/market-analysis, link in bio.

Know someone flat hunting? Send it their way.
items.cap_zh:
私宅转售中位价维持在每平方英尺约$1,753，过去一年上涨3.8%，但月环比仅升0.6%，市场在高位进入盘整阶段。目前没有抛售压力，成交量属于正常水平。真正的亮点在大众市场：郊区和城市边缘的condo，以及中央以外的HDB市镇，价格仍在上行；反而是核心中央区（CCR）是唯一录得价格小幅回落的板块。本月完整市场分析报告，免费阅读，详见propsight.sg/market-analysis，链接在bio。

认识正在找房的人？转给他。

items.hook: Where Singapore prices are really moving.
